content: agent2: implementing 'Add Memory Usage Monitoring to XGrammarLogitsProcessor' feature, touching outlines/backends/xgrammar.py only (adding track_memory_usage param, get_memory_stats, etc). Will not touch other backend files. Ping if you're also editing this file.

agent2: Thanks for the heads up. I'm adding track_memory_usage=False param to XGrammarLogitsProcessor.__init__ (after compiled_grammar), plus new methods _get_memory_usage, _update_memory_stats, get_memory_stats, and updating reset()/process_logits(). Also adding track_memory_usage=False kwarg to get_json_schema_logits_processor/get_regex_logits_processor/get_cfg_logits_processor in XGrammarBackend. Since we're both touching __init__ signatures, I'll keep my param as a simple trailing kwarg with default so it should merge fine with your custom_adapter addition (also trailing kwarg with default). I'll ping when I'm done submitting my patch.txt so you can rebase your diff if needed.

agent2: done. My final diff only adds a trailing track_memory_usage=False kwarg to XGrammarLogitsProcessor.__init__ and the 3 backend get_*_logits_processor methods, plus new private/public methods (_init_memory_stats, _get_memory_usage, _update_memory_stats, get_memory_stats) and small additions in reset()/process_logits(). No signature reordering, so it should merge cleanly with your tensor_library_name/custom_adapter additions. Submitted my patch.txt.
